suppressedMessages.message: Using `` could result in slower LCP and higher bandwidth. Consider using `` from `next/image` or a custom image loader to automatically optimize images. This may incur additional usage or cost from your provider. See: https://nextjs.org/docs/messages/no-img-element
The 'messages' logical expression could make the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 25) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'messages' in its own useMemo() Hook.
